data.tagline: AI-Powered Due Diligence for Upstream Oil & Gas M&A
data.subtitle: Investor Presentation

data.title: Upstream DD costs USD 200K+ and still misses critical red flags

cards.title: Compressed bid timelines
cards.body: 4-8 weeks of analyst time per transaction -- compressing bid timelines and stretching teams beyond capacity.

cards.title: Advisor fees before you've won
cards.body: USD 200K-2M+ in advisor fees -- before you've won the deal. Capital at risk on every process you enter.

cards.title: Red flags found post-close
cards.body: Key red flags buried in VDRs -- found post-close, not pre-sign. The liability was always in the data room.

data.footnote: The bottleneck is human capacity to read, cross-reference, and synthesise under time pressure.

data.title: 86% of M&A leaders now use GenAI — the first-mover window is open
data.footnote: AI capability + market readiness + zero competing product = first-mover window.

data.title: Aigis processes any VDR to board-level DD report in 30 minutes for USD 50-100

cards.title: 1. Ingest
cards.body: Reads every PDF, Excel, DOCX, CSV. Classifies against 87-item upstream DD checklist. Identifies data gaps automatically.

cards.title: 2. Analyse
cards.body: 13 sequential AI analysis calls, each focused on a single DD discipline. Every finding cited to source document and page.

cards.title: 3. Deliver
cards.body: 15-section board-level DD report. Deterministically verified. Interactive dashboard. Financial model stress-testing.

data.footnote: Cost per full synthesis: ~USD 50-100 vs USD 200K+ traditional advisory fees.

data.title: 15 sections covering every material upstream DD question
rows: Entity structure, per-field WI%, reserves, well inventory
Data room rating, 1P/2P/3P, DCA, water cut trends
LTM P&L, cash flow, LOE benchmarking, seller model audit
NPV10, bid range, P50/P90 ABEX, key person risk

data.title: 93% claim accuracy verified across 7+ real transaction VDRs
Four proprietary engines deliver deterministic verification, not generic AI

cards.title: MARKO Verification
cards.body: 93% of quantitative claims deterministically verified against the financial model database.

cards.title: 4-Tier Vishwakarma
cards.body: Regex - Fuzzy - Haiku - Sonnet. Deterministic speed with LLM intelligence. Never fails silently.

cards.title: Kambr Model Builder
cards.body: Generates jurisdiction-aware Excel models (6 fiscal regimes). xlwings COM, self-auditing.

cards.title: Cross-Deal Learning
cards.body: Archon engine detects patterns across deals. Learns from every pipeline run.

data.title: First AI-native platform combining deep domain expertise with deterministic verification
left_items: VDR platforms host docs but don't analyse them
Data providers give reference data, not VDR processing
Generic AI has no domain playbooks or verification
Legal AI covers contracts only, not upstream DD
Advisory firms are deep but manual, slow, USD 200K+
right_items: VDR to Report to Dashboard to Buyer Case

data.title: USD 3.2B serviceable market with clear path to USD 15-30M by Year 3
98% gross margin at scale with multiple revenue streams
data.footnote: At GBP 5K/VDR with ~GBP 80 API cost, gross margin exceeds 98%.

data.title: From concept to validated full synthesis in 6 months
Path to profitability with 5 enterprise customers by Year 1
Seeking GBP 150K-250K pre-seed for product completion and customer acquisition
right_items: Co-authorship of first published case studies
